input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.4.2
            TITLE: cell voltage levels must stay inside the allowed minimum and maximum cell voltage levels

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.4.2: Cell Voltage levels must stay inside the allowed minimum and maximum cell voltage levels
EV.7.4.2 Cell Voltage levels must stay inside the allowed minimum and maximum cell voltage levels 
stated in the cell data sheet.  Measurement accuracy must be considered.

final_answer: Cell Voltage levels must stay inside the allowed minimum and maximum cell voltage levels stated in the cell data sheet. Measurement accuracy must be considered.
